---
title: "Run a turnkey pipeline"
description: "End-to-end composed pipeline, and reference-atlas generation."
categories: [openpipeline_composed]
order: 70
---

[`openpipeline_composed`]{.pkg-tag .pkg-openpipeline_composed}<span class="swatch openpipeline_composed"></span>

The **`openpipeline_composed`** package bundles the individual stages into
turnkey, end-to-end pipelines. Instead of running
[ingestion](ingest-10x.qmd) → [processing](process-filter.qmd) →
[integration](integrate.qmd) → [annotation](annotate.qmd) as separate commands,
one composed workflow chains them together.

## process_integrate_annotate

The flagship `single_cell/process_integrate_annotate` workflow processes,
integrates, and annotates single-cell (multi-)omics data in a single run. It
lets you choose the integration method (Harmony, scVI, Scanorama, BBKNN) and the
annotation method (CellTypist, harmony_knn, scANVI, scvi_knn, SingleR).

```bash
nextflow run https://packages.viash-hub.com/vsh/openpipeline_composed.git \
  -r v0.3.0 -latest -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/single_cell/process_integrate_annotate/main.nf \
  --param_list samples.csv \
  --publish_dir results/
```

The package also exposes `parallel_integration`, `parallel_annotation`, and
`parallel_subtyping` for running a stage several ways at once (e.g. comparing
integration methods on the same cohort).

## Generate a reference atlas

Running `process_integrate_annotate` across a large, multi-donor cohort is also
how you build a **reference atlas**: one integrated, annotated object that later
runs consume as the reference for [label transfer](annotate.qmd). Use
`parallel_subtyping` to resolve fine-grained cell states within the atlas before
publishing it.

:::{.callout-note}
`openpipeline_composed` pins core `openpipeline` plus `openpipeline_qc` and
biobox. Check the [reference](../reference/index.qmd) (filter by
`openpipeline_composed`) for the exact argument list, and its Viash Hub page for
run instructions.
:::

## Reference

Full parameter listings:

| Workflow / component | Description |
|---|---|
| [`single_cell/process_integrate_annotate`](../reference/openpipeline_composed/v0.3.0/single_cell/process_integrate_annotate.qmd) | Turnkey process → integrate → annotate |
| [`single_cell/parallel_integration`](../reference/openpipeline_composed/v0.3.0/single_cell/parallel_integration.qmd) | Multiple integration methods at once |
| [`single_cell/parallel_annotation`](../reference/openpipeline_composed/v0.3.0/single_cell/parallel_annotation.qmd) | Multiple annotation methods at once |
| [`single_cell/parallel_subtyping`](../reference/openpipeline_composed/v0.3.0/single_cell/parallel_subtyping.qmd) | Fine-grained cell-state subtyping |
